name: instagram-clone
description: FastAPI + React 인스타그램 클론 — 원클릭 개발 서버

scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run free:port && cd backend && python run_dev_prep.py && python -W ignore::DeprecationWarning dev_server.py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev:backend:reload: npm run free:port && cd backend && python run_dev_prep.py && python -W ignore::DeprecationWarning dev_server.py --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev: npm run install:all && concurrently -n 백엔드,프론트 -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
